titleStmt.title: SII 37.291: original edition by S. Nagarjuna and K. Munirathnam
No. 291. (A.R. No. B 396 of 1940-41.) Penikalapāḍu, Jammalamaḍugu Taluk, Cuddapah District.

summary.p: Slab in the compound of the Śiva temple.
This is dated Śaka 1475, Bahudhānya, Vaiśākha śu. 2. Irregular.

It records the construction of a temple for god Mahādēva at Penikalapāḍu by Baiṟāju which was given to him by Vallabharāju. It records the grant of land as a dasavanda to Aṭlamalli Reḍḍi Basvi Reḍḍi for the preservation of the temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī jayādbudaya śālivāha
na śakava¨rṣaṁbulu 1475 Agunēṭi ba
hudhānya saṁvatsara vaiśākha śu 2 lu . śrīma
tu baIṟārājugāru vēlpuca¨rla Aṭla mallireḍḍi
basvireḍigāriki Icina dha¨rmaśāsanaṁ . valabha
rājugāru māku pāliṁcina penukala pā
ṭanu valabharājugārki puṇyaṁgānu nēmu
mahādēvaraguḍi kaṭiṁci śuṁnavani śēsē Aṁ
duku mīku dasavaṁdaṁ veṭina cēnu yī
rki paḍamara rēgaḍi kha 1 Akṣarālānu
staḷālu reṁṭanu puṭeṁḍu cē¨rnu Ācaṁ
drākkastāIgānu mīputra pautrapāraṁpa
ryaṁgānu Anubhaviṁcēdi . Idha¨rmā
yavvaru tappinānu tamatallitaṁḍḍi
la vāraṇāśilō vadhiṁcina pāpā
napōduru gaṁgakatagōbrāṁhmani vadhiṁcina pāpāna pōduru dēvastā
naṁ kalakālamu suṁnaṁ śēIṁcu
vāru . svadattādviguṇaṁ puṇyaṁ
paradattānupālanaṁ paradattāpa
hārēṇa svadattaṁ niṣphalaṁ bhavēt .
Digital edition of SII 37.291 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
